description: MediaRoom is PR Newswire/Cision’s public news and press-release site, with product marketing pages for press release distribution and related communications services. The discovered mediaroom.com pages primarily publish news content and route client actions to other domains.
summary: mediaroom.com exposes a public website/news feed surface and no discoverable developer-focused APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, or CLI for integrations on the mediaroom.com domain.
